# Forum AAR template

## Purpose

Use this template for the community-facing AAR thread on the 7CAV PM forums. It follows the official 7CAV structure while making the data useful for Juniper Spear campaign intake.

This forum post is a source document, not the canonical campaign record. Staff should still convert it into the intake packet, fact sheet, and ledger update.

## Mission-design interpretation notes

- **Name of Combat Mission** should match the published Juniper Spear mission title.
- **Campaign of Combat Mission** should be `Juniper Spear 2026`.
- **Number within campaign** should use the campaign episode number such as `M2`, `M4`, or `M10`.
- **Game** should be `ARMA Reforger`.
- **Server Hosted on** should identify the 7CAV server or event host used for the session.
- **Mission OIC BLUFOR** and **Mission OIC OPFOR** should capture the senior leaders running each side.
- **Mission Controller(s)** should list Zeus, GM, or other staff controllers.
- **7th Cavalry Personnel Involved in Action** should use MilPacs profile links instead of `@mentions`.
- Element responses should preserve short **Pros** and **Cons** lists because they are useful for intake review and next-mission planning.

## AAR posting template

```bbcode
[center][b]
DEPARTMENT OF THE ARMY
S3 BATTLE STAFF
Headquarters
7th Cavalry Regiment
COMBAT AFTER ACTION REPORT
[/b][/center]

[b]Name of Combat Mission[/b]:
[b]Campaign of Combat Mission (If applicable)[/b]: Juniper Spear 2026
[b]Number within campaign[/b]:
[b]Game[/b]: ARMA Reforger
[b]Server Hosted on[/b]:

[b]Date of Combat Mission[/b]:
[b]Time of Combat Mission (Zulu)[/b]:
[b]Time of Endex (Zulu)[/b]:

[b]Mission OIC BLUFOR[/b]:
[b]Mission OIC OPFOR[/b]:
[b]Winning Side[/b]:

[b]Mission Controller(s)[/b]:

[b]Number of Attendees[/b]:

[b]7th Cavalry Personnel Involved in Action[/b]:
[LIST=1]
[*]
[*]
[*]
[/LIST]

If your name is not listed, please first ensure your element lead posted their AAR response and included your name in their response. If your name is not listed by your element lead please contact them. If your name is listed in the AAR response, but not the master AAR list, please contact whomever posted this AAR.
```

## Element response template

```bbcode
[center][b]DEPARTMENT OF THE ARMY
S3 BATTLE STAFF
Headquarters
7th Cavalry Regiment
COMBAT AFTER ACTION REPORT
[/b][/center]

[b]Element Callsign[/b]:
[b]Element Leader[/b]:
[b]7th Cavalry Personnel Within Element[/b]:

[b]Pros[/b]:

[b]Cons[/b]:
```

## Name-linking rule

When adding names to the AAR, link members through MilPacs and do not use forum `@mentions`.

- correct: `Staff Sergeant Blake.H` linked through the member MilPacs profile
- incorrect: `@Blake.H`
- incorrect: `SSG.Blake.H`
- incorrect: raw profile URL pasted by itself
